# Norva

> Norva is a multi-screen cloud media player that organizes your own compatible media source and syncs playback across the Web, Android phone, tablet and Android TV. Norva is a player, not a content provider: it includes no channels, movies, series, sports or IPTV subscriptions, and it does not sell third-party credentials.

## What Norva does
- Organizes the catalog from a compatible media source you are authorized to use
- Synchronizes playback progress, history, favorites and preferences across your screens
- Offers profiles, audio/subtitle preferences and personalized recommendations from your own catalog
- Provides offline mode on compatible devices, when the source and rights allow it

## What Norva does not do
- It does not provide or sell channels, movies, series, sports streams, M3U lists or IPTV subscriptions
- It does not supply third-party credentials or a parallel content catalog

## Pages
- [Home](https://norva.tv/)
- [Terms](https://norva.tv/terms.html)
- [Privacy](https://norva.tv/privacy.html)
- [Legal notice](https://norva.tv/mentions-legales.html)
- [Support](https://norva.tv/support.html)

## Trust
- Account data hosted in the European Union, with GDPR access/export/delete rights
- Encrypted downloads on device where hardware-backed keys are available
- Operated by a registered French business, with a public legal notice
